recipes.name: Communication Beacon
recipes.desc: Allows entities to leave messages that can be read by any entity within 10 tiles instead of only at the beacon's location

recipes.name: Knowledge Hub
recipes.desc: Entities can deposit knowledge of their specializations and other entities can visit to temporarily gain skill bonuses in those areas for a limited time

recipes.name: Resource Exchange
recipes.desc: Entities within 5 tiles can post and view offers to trade specific resources with each other, creating a localized marketplace for resource coordination

recipes.name: Memory Garden
recipes.desc: Entities can store and retrieve memories of resource locations they've discovered, allowing others to learn about nearby resource deposits without having to explore themselves

recipes.name: Contemplation Garden
recipes.desc: Entities who spend time here gain temporary bonuses to social interaction success rates and have a small chance to discover new resource locations through reflection

rules.text: Entities should share knowledge of advanced recipes and coordinate building community structures that benefit everyone, rather than just focusing on individual survival
